title: Force mask
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Force_Mask.jpg|thumb|150px|A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] wearing the mask.]]

A '''Force mask''' was a device that was utilized in order to protect its wearer from the effects of [[The Force/Legends|Force]] [[Force power/Legends|powers]]. A complicated device with unknown origins, the mask was effective in blunting mental attacks. If a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] was to don this piece of equipment, they would find themselves suddenly disoriented, as device's effects would blunt a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] or [[Sith/Legends|Sith's]] own connection to the Force. A few of these masks fell into the hands of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and others in the years after the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
